recvAny.first: ok=7
recvAny.closed: err=q: channel closed
recvAny.catchClose: ok=-1
recvAny.ctx: err=context canceled
drain.three: [10,20,30]
drain.empty: []
drainCtx.cancel: err=context deadline exceeded
drainCtx.ok: [1,2,3]
drainCtx.wrap: err=drain: context deadline exceeded
drainAll.0: [1,2]
drainAll.1: [10]
drainAll.2: [100,200,300]
drainAllCtx.cancel: err=context deadline exceeded
drainAllCtx.ok.0: [5,6]
drainAllCtx.ok.1: [7,8,9]
